name: pm-skills
description: 产品经理完整工作流 Skills Plugin — 从知识摄入到需求分析到PRD撰写到代码审查。基于 MinerU 文档引擎，支持双库知识架构。

interface.shortDescription: 产品经理完整工作流：知识引擎→脑暴→PRD→规划→实施→审查→验证→收尾
interface.longDescription: PM Skills provides a complete product manager workflow: knowledge ingestion via MinerU/qmd, brainstorming design, PRD writing, implementation planning with bite-sized TDD tasks, execution, code review, evidence-based verification, and branch finishing. Includes prd-reconcile for merging multiple PRD documents and resolving cross-document conflicts.
defaultPrompt: 帮我从知识到PRD走一遍完整流程
